title: Persons Full Adapter Coverage Version Matrix
description: Common cross-engine and cross-version experiment that exercises the currently available adapter capabilities in one coherent scenario: reverse bulk load, prepare point lookup, reopen or refresh, one direct lookup, random point lookup batch, append cycles with reopen after each cycle, and artifact growth tracking.

dataset.notes: Initial persons(id,name,age) dataset is generated in reverse id order. Three append batches grow the dataset to one million rows.

workload.notes: Scenario: reverse bulk load, prepare structure for point lookup, reopen or refresh, one direct lookup by key, 10k random point lookups, then append cycles with reopen after each cycle and lookup sampling.

fault.notes: No fault injection. This experiment is for fair capability coverage and version comparison.

fairness.notes: Use one shared fairness intent across Polar.DB current source, Polar.DB 2.1.1 NuGet, Polar.DB 2.1.0 NuGet, and SQLite.
